assets.name: player_idle
assets.prompt: Fighting stance with fists up near chin, ready to fight, confident expression.

assets.name: player_punch_left
assets.prompt: Throwing a RIGHT arm jab punch, RIGHT fist extended forward at shoulder height, LEFT fist guarding chin.

assets.name: player_punch_right
assets.prompt: Throwing a LEFT arm cross punch, LEFT fist extended forward at shoulder height, RIGHT fist guarding chin.

assets.name: player_kick_front
assets.prompt: Executing a front kick, RIGHT leg extended forward at waist height, LEFT foot planted, arms up for guard.

assets.name: player_kick_side
assets.prompt: Executing a side kick, RIGHT leg extended sideways at chest height, LEFT foot planted, arms spread for balance.

assets.name: player_kick_back
assets.prompt: Executing a spinning back kick, body rotated, RIGHT leg extended behind at high height, powerful spinning motion.

assets.name: player_walk
assets.prompt: Walking forward confidently, casual stride, arms swaying naturally.

assets.name: player_hurt
assets.prompt: Getting hit and recoiling backward, pain expression, body leaning back from impact, sweat drops.

assets.name: player_dodge
assets.prompt: Dodging an attack, leaning back with fast reflexes, dynamic evasion pose.

assets.name: player_victory
assets.prompt: Victory celebration, one fist pumped up in the air, big happy triumphant grin.

assets.name: player_defeat
assets.prompt: Knocked down on one knee, exhausted, bruised but still defiant look.

assets.name: player_training
assets.prompt: Hitting a sandbag with focused intensity, one fist striking the bag, training hard.
